summary: Frontend visual polish testing completed for Celebrate, Dine, Pet Profile, and Member Dashboard pages. All features verified working correctly.

celebrate_page.staggered_animations: PASS - 6 experience cards with animate-fade-in-up class and staggered delays (0ms to 500ms)
celebrate_page.experience_cards: PASS - Ultimate Birthday Bash, Gotcha Day Special, Pawty Planning Pro, Puppy Shower, Pet Wedding Ceremony, Milestone Moments
celebrate_page.mobile_responsive: PASS - Grid adapts to 2 columns on mobile, bottom nav visible

dine_page.hero_clean_text: PASS - No ghost/shadow effect (textShadow: 'none'), solid gradient overlay from-orange-900 via-orange-800/95 to-red-800/90
dine_page.experience_cards: PASS - Private Chef Experience, Restaurant VIP Access, Birthday Dining Package visible
dine_page.mobile_responsive: PASS - Clean hero text, CTAs visible, bottom nav present

pet_profile.gallery_empty_slots: PASS - Engaging design with gradient backgrounds (from-purple-50 to-pink-50), dashed borders, hover effects
pet_profile.lightbox_animations: PASS - animate-fade-in on backdrop, animate-scale-in on image, animate-fade-in-up on action buttons

member_dashboard.skeleton_loader: PASS - Premium skeleton with gradient header, Soul Score grid placeholders, card skeletons, loading spinner

conversational_entry.stay_page: PASS - Goal cards visible (Vacation getaway, Pet boarding, etc.), clicking creates service ticket with toast notification
conversational_entry.other_pillars: PASS - ConversationalEntry or equivalent service cards present on all pillar pages

mobile_responsiveness.celebrate: PASS - 390x844 viewport, back button, bottom nav, 2-column grid
mobile_responsiveness.dine: PASS - 390x844 viewport, clean hero, CTAs visible, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.stay: PASS - 390x844 viewport, hero section, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.care: PASS - 390x844 viewport, hero section, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.travel: PASS - 390x844 viewport, back button, hero section, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.learn: PASS - 390x844 viewport, back button, hero section, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.fit: PASS - 390x844 viewport, back button, hero section, bottom nav
mobile_responsiveness.enjoy: PASS - 390x844 viewport, hero section, bottom nav

animation_keyframes_verified.fadeInUp: Defined at line 436 - opacity 0 to 1, translateY 20px to 0
animation_keyframes_verified.scaleIn: Defined at line 466 - opacity 0 to 1, scale 0.9 to 1
animation_keyframes_verified.stagger_classes: Defined at lines 500-504 - stagger-1 to stagger-5 with 0.1s to 0.5s delays

context_for_next_testing_agent: All visual polish features verified working: staggered animations on Celebrate and Dine pages, clean hero text on Dine page, gallery empty slots and lightbox animations on Pet Profile, skeleton loader on Member Dashboard. All pages responsive on mobile 390x844 viewport. ConversationalEntry goal cards create service tickets successfully on Stay page.
